_source: Hand-curated firearm accessory rows missing from cyber.dat. Each row inserts into the gear table with a gear_accessories child row so the standard-accessory parser can resolve standard names against them. Page refs are from SR3 BBB and Cannon Companion as cited.
_notes: Internal Smartgun systems: SR3 BBB p.282 lists 'Smartgun, internal' alongside 'Smartgun, external'. The sr3data file only ingests the external variants ('Smartlink level I/II, External'); we add the internal counterparts here so firearms with a standard 'Smartlink' accessory can resolve to the gun-side internal hardware rather than the user-mounted external one.

Cost convention follows SR3 BBB: internal smartlink adds +100% to the weapon's price (encoded as `cost_pct_of_weapon = 100` for downstream consumers). For now we store the base cost as null since it isn't a fixed nuyen value.

accessories.name: Smartlink level I, Internal
accessories.notes: Built into the firearm. SR3 BBB p.282: +100% to weapon cost if installed after manufacturing.

accessories.name: Smartlink level II, Internal
accessories.notes: Built into the firearm; Smartlink-2 variant providing -2 TN with a Smartlink-2-compatible user system.
